# Qwillio — Design System
## Generated by /impeccable document from codebase (2026-05)

---

## Visual Direction

Editorial, asymmetric, two-color committed brand. Q-indigo + W-violet from the logo carry the surface. NOT centered SaaS template, NOT gradient-text headlines, NOT identical card grids.

**Brand register** (marketing): cream/white base, indigo and violet alternating as drenched accents, system serif italic in solid color for single-word emphasis only.

**Product register** (app/dashboard/admin): dark indigo-tinted near-black surfaces, restrained accent, fast and dense.

## Skills Active

Three skills configured and enforced:
- `impeccable` v3.1.1: color strategy = **committed** (brand) / **restrained** (product). Hard-refuse the six absolute bans.
- `taste-skill`: DESIGN_VARIANCE = 8, MOTION_INTENSITY = 6, VISUAL_DENSITY = 4. Asymmetric grids, magnetic interactions, spring physics, no Inter, no 3-column equal card grids.
- `emil-design-eng`: strong custom ease-out curve, scale(0.97) on press, never animate from scale(0), springs only where decorative, prefers-reduced-motion respected, 30-80ms stagger.

---

## Token Sources (Actual Code)

Three token files ship in the codebase. Use the correct one per context.

| File | Used in | Import |
|---|---|---|
| `src/styles/globals.css` | Tailwind + global CSS | CSS custom properties `var(--q-*)` |
| `src/styles/pro-theme.ts` | ProBlocks pages (Calls, Leads, etc.) | `import { pro, proShadow, proCard } from '../styles/pro-theme'` |
| `src/styles/admin-theme.ts` | Admin + dashboard pages | `import { t, glass, cx } from '../styles/admin-theme'` |

---

## Colors

### Product Register — Signal Dark v3 (OKLCH)

Defined in `globals.css` as CSS vars and mirrored in `pro-theme.ts` / `admin-theme.ts` as JS objects.

```css
/* globals.css — :root */
--q-bg:         oklch(8% 0.009 265);    /* page surface */
--q-bg2:        oklch(11% 0.013 265);   /* card / panel */
--q-bg3:        oklch(15% 0.017 265);   /* elevated / hover */
--q-panel:      oklch(11% 0.013 265);
--q-panel-hi:   oklch(15% 0.017 265);
--q-border:     oklch(22% 0.012 265 / 0.55);
--q-border-hi:  oklch(30% 0.014 265 / 0.70);
--q-accent:     oklch(56% 0.22 264);    /* logo indigo — Q circle */
--q-accent-hi:  oklch(63% 0.21 264);
--q-accent-dim: oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.12);
--q-accent-brd: oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.35);
--q-violet:     oklch(67% 0.26 299);    /* logo violet — W circle */
--q-text:       oklch(95% 0.004 265);
--q-text-2:     oklch(65% 0.007 265);
--q-text-3:     oklch(42% 0.006 265);
--q-ok:         oklch(72% 0.18 145);
--q-warn:       oklch(78% 0.18 75);
--q-bad:        oklch(65% 0.22 25);
```

JS equivalent (`admin-theme.ts` — `t` object):

```ts
t.bg          // oklch(8% 0.009 265)
t.panel       // oklch(11% 0.013 265)
t.panelHi     // oklch(15% 0.017 265)
t.elevated    // oklch(14% 0.015 265)
t.inset       // oklch(6% 0.007 265)
t.border      // oklch(22% 0.012 265 / 0.55)
t.borderHi    // oklch(30% 0.014 265 / 0.70)
t.borderFocus // oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.50)
t.text        // oklch(95% 0.004 265)
t.textSec     // oklch(65% 0.007 265)
t.textTer     // oklch(42% 0.006 265)
t.textMuted   // oklch(28% 0.005 265)
t.brand       // oklch(56% 0.22 264)  — indigo accent
t.brandHi     // oklch(63% 0.21 264)
t.violet      // oklch(67% 0.26 299)
t.live        // oklch(72% 0.18 145)  — green "live" indicator
t.success     // oklch(72% 0.18 145)
t.warning     // oklch(78% 0.18 75)
t.danger      // oklch(65% 0.22 25)
t.info        // oklch(70% 0.18 240)
t.accentGrad  // linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(52% 0.24 264) 0%, oklch(63% 0.22 264) 100%)
t.accentGlow  // oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.22)
t.accentMid   // oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.10)
t.accentDim   // oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.12)
t.accentBrd   // oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.40)
t.violetGlow  // oklch(67% 0.26 299 / 0.20)
t.mesh        // radial-gradient indigo+violet ambient — used as page background accent layer
```

### Brand Register — Marketing Pages

Marketing pages use hex directly in JSX (no CSS vars). Actual values from `Home.tsx`, `Landing.tsx`, `Pricing.tsx`:

```
Indigo:       #6366f1   (= oklch(56% 0.22 264))
Violet:       #a855f7   (= oklch(67% 0.26 299))
Page surface: bg-white / bg-[#fafaf8]
Ink primary:  #1d1d1f
Ink hairline: rgba(29,29,31,0.08)  (border-[#1d1d1f]/8 in Tailwind)
```

Drenched dark sections (pricing hero, CTA blocks):
- Indigo-led: `linear-gradient(155deg, #1d1d1f 0%, #2a234a 60%, #5b2f7a 110%)`
- Violet-led: `linear-gradient(155deg, #1d1d1f 0%, #3a1f4a 55%, #a855f7 115%)`

### Color Strategy by Surface

| Surface | Strategy | Indigo | Violet |
|---|---|---|---|
| Home hero | Committed | hero accent | secondary accent |
| Landing (Receptionist) | Drenched section + committed page | drenched + accent | secondary |
| Agent | Drenched section + committed page | secondary | drenched + accent |
| Pricing | Committed, Pro tier drenched | Pro tier | badge |
| Dashboard / App | Restrained | accent, max 10% pixels | agent / lead semantics |
| Admin | Restrained | accent only | module indicators |
| Legal | Light intentional | accent links | — |

## Shadows

From `admin-theme.ts` and `pro-theme.ts`:

```ts
t.shadow       // '0 1px 3px oklch(0% 0 0 / 0.55), 0 0 0 1px oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.04)'
t.shadowFloat  // '0 8px 40px oklch(0% 0 0 / 0.70), 0 0 0 1px oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.06)'
t.shadowGlow   // '0 0 0 1px oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.30), 0 4px 20px oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.18)'

proShadow.card  // '0 1px 3px oklch(0% 0 0 / 0.60), 0 0 0 1px oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.04)'
proShadow.float // '0 8px 40px oklch(0% 0 0 / 0.75), 0 0 0 1px oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.06)'
proShadow.glow  // '0 0 0 1px oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.35), 0 4px 24px oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.22)'
proShadow.btn   // '0 2px 16px oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.45)'
```

---

## Typography

### Families

- **Outfit** — loaded via Google Fonts (`globals.css` line 1). Used everywhere: body, UI, dashboard, marketing prose. `font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif`.
- **System serif italic** — `className="font-serif italic"` in Tailwind. Used ONLY for single-word emphasis in large brand headings, in solid brand color (#6366f1 or #a855f7). Never gradient. Never in product register.
- **No Inter.** Banned.
- **No serif in dashboard/admin/product context.** Banned.
- **Monospace** — system mono, `font-mono text-[11px] tabular-nums` (cx.mono in admin-theme).

### Scale — Product Register (admin-theme.ts `cx` object)

```ts
cx.h1       // text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight           — ~18px page title
cx.h2       // text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.08em]  — section eyebrow
cx.h3       // text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.1em]     — sub-label
cx.body     // text-[13px] leading-relaxed                    — default body
cx.caption  // text-[11px]                                    — meta, timestamps
cx.mono     // font-mono text-[11px] tabular-nums             — numbers, IDs
```

### Scale — Brand Register (marketing pages)

```
Display hero:      clamp(2.6rem, 6.5vw, 5.6rem), weight 600, tracking -0.04em, line-height 0.95
Display secondary: clamp(2rem, 4.5vw, 3.6rem), weight 600, tracking -0.035em
H2 marketing:      clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.4rem), weight 600, tracking -0.025em
Body marketing:    15-18px, line-height 1.55-1.7, max 65ch
Eyebrow labels:    10-11px, weight 700, tracking 0.18-0.22em, uppercase
```

Hierarchy: minimum 1.25 ratio between steps. Scale + weight + color combined. Never gradient text.

---

## Motion

### Ease Curves (globals.css CSS vars)

```css
--ease-out:      cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1);
--ease-out-expo: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
--ease-in-out:   cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1);
--ease-drawer:   cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1);
```

### Press Feedback (global, all interactive elements)

Applied globally in `globals.css`. All `button`, `[role="button"]`, `.btn-press` get:

```css
transition: transform 120ms var(--ease-out);
:active { transform: scale(0.97); }
```

Add `data-press` attribute to `<Link>` and `<a>` CTA tags in JSX so press applies without relying on global selector alone.

### Page Transitions

```css
.admin-page {
  animation: pageIn 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) both;
}
@keyframes pageIn {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(6px) scale(0.99); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
}
```

Apply `cx.pageWrap` (which includes `admin-page`) to every page-level wrapper in the product register.

### Rules

- Ease out (quart / expo). No bounce, no elastic, no spring in structural layout.
- Never animate CSS layout properties (width, height, top, left, margin, padding).
- Stagger: 30-80ms between items.
- `prefers-reduced-motion` respected globally via `globals.css` (all durations collapsed to 0ms).

---

## Components

### Globals (globals.css @layer components)

```css
.btn-primary    /* indigo fill, shadow, scale(0.97) active */
.btn-secondary  /* dark fill, border, scale(0.97) active */
.btn-danger     /* red fill */
.btn-success    /* green fill */
.card           /* panel bg, border, 14px radius, 1.5rem padding */
.stat-card      /* card + border-color hover transition */
.input          /* dark inset bg, indigo focus border at /0.45 */
.badge          /* inline-flex pill base — combine with .badge-* modifier */
.badge-new / .badge-contacted / .badge-interested / .badge-qualified / .badge-converted / .badge-lost / .badge-active
.status-dot     /* 6px circle, 2s ease-in-out pulse animation */
.scrollbar-hide
.pro-table-row  /* hover bg transition 0.12s */
```

### JS Component Presets (admin-theme.ts)

```ts
glass     // panel bg + blur(12px) + border + 14px radius + shadow
glassHi   // elevated bg + blur(12px) + borderHi + shadowFloat
inputStyle // inset bg, border, rSm, text color, 13px, Outfit
tooltipStyle // dark bg/0.97, blurSm, borderHi, 10px radius, 12px, textSec

// Radius tokens
t.r     // 14px  — cards, panels
t.rSm   // 10px  — inputs, buttons, chips
t.rFull // 9999px — pills, toggles
```

### Utility Classes (admin-theme.ts `cx`)

```ts
cx.btnPrimary  // px-4 py-2 rounded-[10px] text-[13px] font-medium transition-colors 150ms
cx.btnGhost    // + hover:bg-white/[0.06]
cx.btnIcon     // p-2 rounded-[10px] hover:bg-white/[0.05]
cx.th          // px-4 py-3 text-left text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
cx.td          // px-4 py-3 text-[13px]
cx.tr          // border-b border-white/[0.04] hover:bg-white/[0.016] transition-colors pro-table-row
cx.pageWrap    // space-y-5 max-w-[1440px] admin-page
cx.cardGrid    // grid gap-3
```

### JS Presets (pro-theme.ts)

```ts
proCard        // { background: panel, border, borderRadius: 16, boxShadow: proShadow.card }
proPrimaryBtn  // { background: accentGrad, color: light, boxShadow: proShadow.btn }
proGhostBtn    // { background: white/0.03, color: text, border }
```

---

## Layout

### Product Register

- Max width: `max-w-[1440px]` via `cx.pageWrap`
- Grid gap: `gap-3` default, `gap-4` for stat grids
- Card radius: 14-16px
- Cell padding: `px-4 py-3` for tables, `1.5rem` for cards

### Brand Register

- No fixed container on full-bleed sections
- Asymmetric layouts: avoid equal-weight column splits
- Vary section vertical padding for rhythm: alternate `py-14` / `py-18` / `py-28`
- Cards only when truly the best affordance. Nested cards are banned.

---

## Absolute Bans (impeccable — match-and-refuse)

1. **Side-stripe borders** — no `border-left` / `border-right` > 1px as colored card accents. Use background tints, full borders, or leading numbers/icons instead.
2. **Gradient text** — no `background-clip: text` + gradient. Solid color only. Emphasis via weight or size.
3. **Glassmorphism as default** — blur/glass only when purposeful, not for general cards.
4. **Hero-metric template** — no "big number + label + 3 stats + gradient accent" SaaS layout.
5. **Identical card grids** — no same-size cards with icon + heading + text repeated in a uniform grid.
6. **Modal as first thought** — exhaust inline / progressive disclosure before reaching for a modal.

Also: no em dashes (neither `—` nor `--`). Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.

---

## Badges — Status Semantic Colors

| Status | Background | Foreground |
|---|---|---|
| new | oklch(70% 0.18 240 / 0.15) | oklch(70% 0.18 240) — blue |
| contacted | oklch(78% 0.18 75 / 0.15) | oklch(78% 0.18 75) — amber |
| interested | oklch(75% 0.18 50 / 0.15) | oklch(75% 0.18 50) — orange |
| qualified | oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.15) | oklch(56% 0.22 264) — indigo |
| converted / active | oklch(72% 0.18 145 / 0.15) | oklch(72% 0.18 145) — green |
| lost | oklch(65% 0.22 25 / 0.15) | oklch(65% 0.22 25) — red |

Call ticker tags used in brand-register mockups (Home.tsx):
- BOOKED: rgba(99,102,241,0.18) / #a5b4fc
- LEAD: rgba(168,85,247,0.18) / #d8b4fe
- TRANSFER: rgba(245,158,11,0.18) / #fcd34d
- CALLBACK: rgba(255,255,255,0.12) / #ffffff

---

## Mesh Gradient Pattern

Ambient background layer used on product surfaces to prevent flat-black dead zones:

```ts
t.mesh = `
  radial-gradient(ellipse 220px 180px at 10% 0%, oklch(56% 0.22 264 / 0.09) 0%, transparent 70%),
  radial-gradient(ellipse 160px 120px at 90% 100%, oklch(67% 0.26 299 / 0.06) 0%, transparent 70%)
`
```

Apply as `position: absolute; inset: 0; pointerEvents: none` layer behind content, never above.

---

## Tailwind Config Note

`tailwind.config.js` has a legacy `primary` color scale (hex values, not OKLCH). Do not use in new code. Use inline OKLCH values or token objects from `pro-theme.ts` / `admin-theme.ts`. The `primary.*` scale exists for backward compatibility only.

---

## AI Slop Test

Before shipping any surface, run both checks:

1. **First-order reflex**: could someone guess the palette from the domain alone? "AI voice tool = dark blue + neon glow" is failure. Rework until the answer is not obvious from the domain.
2. **Second-order reflex**: could someone guess the aesthetic family from domain + anti-references? "AI voice tool that avoids neon = editorial cream typographic" is also failure. Both answers must be non-obvious.

Anti-references for Qwillio: Salesforce, HubSpot enterprise white/teal, default Tailwind + shadcn, centered hero + 3 metric tiles, identical 4-icon feature row, flat AI robot illustrations.
